methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $95M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 5 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Robotics & Manufacturing. Range: $1.0B - $2.0B.

private.name: Hadrian
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C), post-money $1.6B

private.name: Nimble Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C), post-money $1B

private.name: Bright Machines
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C)

data.narrative:
Vention, a Series C robotics and manufacturing automation company that has raised $95M+ to date, is evaluated against a peer universe of 9 private robotics firms and 1 public comparable (277810.KQ). The company founders are Etienne Lacroix and Max Windisch.

Two valuation methods triangulate to a range. The stage-progression method applies a 1.7x step-up multiplier typical of Series C advancement to the $95M total raised proxy, implying $162M. The peer-median method references five same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables—Exotec (Series D, $2.0B), Bedrock Robotics (Series B, $1.8B), Dexterity (Series B, $1.6B), Hadrian (Series C, $1.6B), and Nimble Robotics (Series C, $1.0B)—which establish a median valuation of $1.6B with a range of $1.0B to $2.0B. The stage-progression method substantially underweights relative to peer positioning, reflecting either market premium for the sector or valuation compression from earlier-stage fundraising.

The triangulated analysis supports a range of $137M (low) to $1.9B (high), with a median of $906M. Key uncertainties include whether Vention's capital efficiency and customer traction justify peer-level valuations—the peer set spans a wide range—and the relevance of the single public comparable to private deployment dynamics. Further diligence on revenue scale, margin profile, and customer concentration would refine positioning within this range.
